query: SELECT id, question, correctAnswer, choiceA, choiceB, choiceC, choiceD FROM questions LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2swA4tT294zrk84.root --database K9zcGqZStPdpJb7EpmeNSf --execute SELECT id, question, correctAnswer, choiceA, choiceB, choiceC, choiceD FROM questions LIMIT 5;

rows.question: What is the correct spelling of the word meaning "to move quickly"?
Which sentence is grammatically correct?
rows.choiceA: She go to school every day
rows.choiceB: She goes to school every day
rows.choiceC: She going to school every day
rows.choiceD: She gone to school every day

rows.question: Choose the correct form of the verb: "I ___ to the store yesterday"

stdout:
id	question	correctAnswer	choiceA	choiceB	choiceC	choiceD
1	What is the correct spelling of the word meaning "to move quickly"?	B	runn	run	rune	rund
2	Which sentence is grammatically correct?	B	She go to school every day	She goes to school every day	She going to school every day	She gone to school every day
3	What does "hello" mean?	B	goodbye	a greeting	thank you	please
4	Choose the correct form of the verb: "I ___ to the store yesterday"	C	go	goes	went	going
5	What is the opposite of "hot"?	B	warm	cold	cool	freezing
